programs.summary_en: Best first stop if you are in a government hospital or a hospital with a Malasakit Center. It brings PhilHealth, DSWD, PCSO, and other medical assistance desks together inside the hospital.
programs.summary_fil: Magandang unang puntahan kung nasa government hospital ka o may Malasakit Center ang ospital. Pinagsasama nito ang PhilHealth, DSWD, PCSO, at iba pang medical assistance desks sa loob mismo ng ospital.
programs.best_for_en: Government-hospital patients, indigent or financially incapacitated patients, and families who need one-stop help before discharge.
programs.best_for_fil: Mga pasyente sa government hospital, indigent o financially incapacitated na pasyente, at mga pamilyang nangangailangan ng one-stop na tulong bago ma-discharge.
documents_en: Any valid ID of the patient or watcher
Current hospital bill, charge slip, prescription, or procedure request, depending on what still needs assistance
Birth certificate, marriage certificate, or another valid ID if PhilHealth membership or dependent records still need updating
documents_fil: Anumang valid ID ng pasyente o bantay
Kasalukuyang hospital bill, charge slip, reseta, o request para sa procedure, depende sa kailangan pang tulong
Birth certificate, marriage certificate, o ibang valid ID kung kailangan pang ayusin ang PhilHealth membership o dependent record
steps_en: Go to the Malasakit Center inside the hospital before paying the remaining balance.
The hospital social worker usually completes the intake sheet and routes the case to PhilHealth, DSWD, PCSO, and other desks in one place.
steps_fil: Pumunta muna sa Malasakit Center sa loob ng ospital bago magbayad ng natitirang bill.
Karaniwang ang hospital social worker ang tumutulong sa intake sheet at nagru-route ng kaso sa PhilHealth, DSWD, PCSO, at iba pang desks sa iisang lugar.
programs.note_en: Exact document requirements can still vary by hospital, but a valid ID plus the current bill, charge slip, or prescription is the usual starting set.
programs.note_fil: Puwede pa ring mag-iba ang eksaktong requirements depende sa ospital, pero kadalasang nagsisimula ito sa valid ID at kasalukuyang bill, charge slip, o reseta.
programs.source_label_en: Official source: DSWD Malasakit Centers page and Southern Isabela Medical Center Citizen's Charter
programs.source_label_fil: Opisyal na source: DSWD Malasakit Centers page at Southern Isabela Medical Center Citizen's Charter
programs.source_label_2_en: Checklist example: Southern Isabela Medical Center Malasakit Center
programs.source_label_2_fil: Halimbawa ng checklist: Southern Isabela Medical Center Malasakit Center

programs.summary_en: For large remaining hospital bills, dialysis, chemotherapy, implants, and some medicine requests when PhilHealth is not enough.
programs.summary_fil: Para sa malalaking natitirang hospital bill, dialysis, chemotherapy, implants, at ilang requests para sa gamot kapag kulang ang PhilHealth.
programs.best_for_en: Families with a big remaining balance after PhilHealth, especially if the hospital bill is still unpaid or the patient is still confined.
programs.best_for_fil: Mga pamilyang may malaking natitirang balance matapos ang PhilHealth, lalo na kung hindi pa bayad ang hospital bill o naka-confine pa ang pasyente.
documents_en: Original or certified true copy of the medical abstract or clinical summary signed by the attending physician
Latest hospital bill or final statement of account showing PhilHealth, senior citizen, HMO, MSS, and other deductions
If already discharged: promissory note or hospital certification showing the remaining balance
documents_fil: Orihinal o certified true copy ng medical abstract o clinical summary na pirmado ng attending physician
Pinakabagong hospital bill o final statement of account na nagpapakita ng PhilHealth, senior citizen, HMO, MSS, at iba pang deductions
Kung discharged na: promissory note o sertipikasyon mula sa ospital na may natitirang balance
steps_en: Ask the hospital social worker or billing office if they can help route the request to PCSO or the nearest PCSO branch.
Bring the hospital bill and doctor-signed medical abstract first so the request can be assessed immediately.
steps_fil: Magtanong sa hospital social worker o billing office kung matutulungan ka nilang i-route ang request sa PCSO o sa pinakamalapit na PCSO branch.
Dalhin agad ang hospital bill at medical abstract na pirmado ng doktor para ma-assess kaagad ang request.
programs.note_en: Some requests, such as dialysis, chemotherapy, or medicines, may need extra documents like a prescription, treatment protocol, official quotation, or dialysis-center acceptance letter.
programs.note_fil: May ilang request, gaya ng dialysis, chemotherapy, o gamot, na puwedeng mangailangan ng dagdag na dokumento gaya ng reseta, treatment protocol, official quotation, o acceptance letter ng dialysis center.
programs.source_label_fil: Opisyal na source: PCSO Citizen's Charter 2025

programs.summary_en: For hospital bills, medicines, laboratory requests, or other medical needs after social-worker assessment.
programs.summary_fil: Para sa hospital bill, gamot, laboratory requests, o iba pang medical needs matapos ang assessment ng social worker.
programs.best_for_en: Patients in crisis, indigent families, or households that still cannot pay the remaining bill after PhilHealth.
programs.best_for_fil: Mga pasyenteng nasa krisis, indigent na pamilya, o sambahayang hindi pa rin kayang bayaran ang natitirang bill matapos ang PhilHealth.
documents_en: One valid ID of the patient or client; in exceptional cases, barangay certification may be used if no ID is available
Medical certificate, clinical abstract, discharge summary, or Alagang Pinoy Tagubilin Form with diagnosis and physician details, issued within 3 months
Hospital bill or statement of account with billing signature, or certificate of balance and promissory note for the remaining hospital balance
Social case study report or case summary from a registered social worker
documents_fil: Isang valid ID ng pasyente o kliyente; sa exceptional cases, puwedeng barangay certification kung walang ID
Medical certificate, clinical abstract, discharge summary, o Alagang Pinoy Tagubilin Form na may diagnosis at detalye ng doktor, na ibinigay sa loob ng 3 buwan
Hospital bill o statement of account na may pirma ng billing, o certificate of balance at promissory note para sa natitirang hospital balance
Social case study report o case summary mula sa registered social worker
steps_en: Go to the DSWD Crisis Intervention Unit or ask the hospital medical social worker how to route the request.
Bring the hospital bill and medical abstract first so the staff can assess the case and tell you if more documents are needed.
steps_fil: Pumunta sa DSWD Crisis Intervention Unit o magtanong sa hospital medical social worker kung paano i-route ang request.
Dalhin agad ang hospital bill at medical abstract para ma-assess ng staff ang kaso at masabi kung may kulang pang dokumento.
programs.note_en: For medicine or laboratory assistance, DSWD may also ask for a prescription or doctor's order. Requests above ₱10,000 usually need a quotation.
programs.note_fil: Para sa medicine o laboratory assistance, puwede ring hingin ng DSWD ang reseta o doctor's order. Ang requests na lampas ₱10,000 ay karaniwang nangangailangan ng quotation.
programs.source_label_en: Official source: DSWD AICS Citizen's Charter
programs.source_label_fil: Opisyal na source: DSWD AICS Citizen's Charter
